agent.name: GitHub Copilot CLI
agent.description: GitHub Copilot CLI through the Agent Client Protocol
runtime.install.title: Install GitHub Copilot CLI for Tutti
runtime.install.description: Installs pinned GitHub Copilot CLI 1.0.71 only in Tutti's managed runtime directory.
runtime.authRequired: Run `copilot login` in a terminal first, or configure an officially supported token. ACP cannot use the interactive /login picker.
